comment.body:
Hey @Alma, just taking advantage of the quiet here after the close. I know you're asleep, and I'm happy to ask some other time:)
Rereading the chats came into that train of thought of yours from last Wednesday regarding the big geopicture east vs.west, Greenland, trump's national economy, gold and soros bubble burst concept. Beautiful to read, thank you for that:) it did get me wondering...im trying to better understand if the money spent and topics talked about by the trump gov. (Like precious metals price floors, and the critical minerals stockpile) are real tellsigns you also look out for in your geopolitic analysis to form your picture, or if this is just the curtain cover story to look through and how it's used to improve sentiment to further to feed into a "bubble" in gold, silver etc. (Although central bank buying gold all over the world is e.g. very real as you also shared in an image these days)...
I would say it's all part of the economic and resource east west war, coupled with US government debts and USD reserve currency disappearance. But with you rightfully (again!) calling out a speculativel top for gold (and generally pm) last week, I'm wondering. Or is this more to do with the hedgefunds turned momentum traders fueling rallies. Would love to pick that beautiful mind of yours:) after all golds grinding back up over 5k USD (for the moment) so wondering how you read the tape on all this, with it apparently both linked to geopolitics and the bubble burst concept of soros you shared.

comment.body:
I've read back more chats and saw more of your insights, @Alma , they are so good! I'm stunned. Also read back more of your daily, weekly and macro posts and they are so much clearer than last year! Still so densely packed with info, but much better structured.
You're a treasure. I'm learning so much. 
I've answered my own question from before or at least condensed it. 
What's the more impactful driver on gold, dalio mentioned capital war or soros boom and bust reflexivity framework?:) Wondering since they play out against each other (as in capital war drives cold up, bust brings it down), while both seem immensely important. I know the big plan is tokenized trading, and that needs boom and bust beforehand and you said H2 selling for gold. But how does that interplay with the capital war, or is that more of a speculative geo risk (then again all the geo risks are real risks but still risks, not certainties) but boom and bust cycle is more of a certainty, as soros said, sequence is clearly laid out, its a matter of when, not if...
